list.vod_blurb: &nbsp;Timur is an action-thriller that follows the real-life international hostage crisis that took
list.vod_content: Timur is an action-thriller that follows the real-life international hostage crisis that took place in Mapenduma in 1996. The subsequent rescue operation was overseen by now-Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto.
